name: recently_added
description: Recently Added view for Volumio's local music library — uses MPD's built-in modified-since query
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Adds a 'Recently Added' entry to the Browse menu showing albums added to your library within configurable time windows. Reads directly from MPD's database — no separate index, no watcher, no native modules.
volumio_info.changelog: v0.4.2: album rows now show the artist as a secondary column (matching Volumio's stock Albums view). Compilations are detected smartly — even when AlbumArtist is tagged as '*' or missing — and normalized to the literal 'Various Artists' label, matching Volumio's stock English-only convention for this term. Genuinely untagged albums omit the column rather than showing a stray placeholder. v0.4.1: tile name now translates with the rest of the UI.
